caption: The video appears to be an educational tutorial on cryogenic engineering, specifically focusing on the concept of Figure of Merit (FOM). The presentation is part of Tutorial 2 and is delivered by Prof. M D Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay. The screen shows a thermodynamic diagram with various processes labeled, such as constant temperature (T=const), constant pressure (p=const), and constant enthalpy (h=const) lines. The left side of the screen displays calculations for FOM, initially showing a value of -6265.22 for Wc/mf. As the video progresses, another calculation appears, showing a different FOM value of 767 for the same parameter. This suggests that the tutorial is explaining how different conditions or processes can affect the FOM in cryogenic systems, likely aiming to teach students how to optimize these systems for better performance.
